title: CSR Service & Claim
description: A web-based internal system for managing PC sales reports, service requests, and claim tracking.This project transformed a paper-based workflow into a centralized digital platform to reduce human error and improve visibility across operations.
pain: Difficulty tracking issues and claim history
Lack of real-time visibility for ongoing problems
approach: Analyzed paper-based processes and validated workflow with stakeholders
Designed a structured user flow to streamline report submission and tracking
Created wireframes to map key user interactions and system logic
Conducted internal workshops to gather feedback and align with real user needs
Iterated on design based on feedback before development
solution: Developed a dashboard-based interface for tracking reports and claims in real time
Built reusable UI components to ensure consistency and scalability
Implemented structured data input flows to reduce manual errors
Designed system navigation to simplify task completion and improve usability
impact: Reduced manual data collection errors through structured input system
Improved efficiency in report preparation and submission
Enabled real-time tracking of service and claim status
Increased visibility across teams, making issues easier to monitor and resolve

title: Marketing Campaign Manager
description: A web-based internal tool,replaced fragmented Google Sheets/Excel workflows with a centralized platform, improving visibility, organization, and task management, designed to manage and track marketing artwork across multiple campaigns, stores, and work types.
pain: Difficulty tracking artwork status across multiple campaigns and stores
Complex categorization of artwork types and campaign variations
Inefficient time management due to scattered and manual tracking
approach: Analyzed different types of artwork and campaign structures with stakeholders
Designed a clear categorization system for artwork types and campaign grouping
Created user flows to simplify task tracking, assignment, and approval processes
Developed wireframes to map system behavior and interactions
Conducted internal workshops to validate workflows and gather feedback
Iterated on structure and flow based on real usage requirements
solution: Designed structured data input flows to standardize artwork tracking
Implemented clear mapping between artwork, work type, and responsible person
Created a scalable UI system to support multiple campaign scenarios
Simplified navigation to improve task management and reduce confusion
impact: Improved efficiency in tracking artwork progress across campaigns
Reduced complexity in managing multiple artwork types
Enabled more structured and scalable workflow management
Improved coordination between teams involved in campaign execution

title: PM Management
description: A web-based internal system redesigned to manage POS allocation for temporary retail booths and sales events.The system helps coordinate POS usage across multiple locations, ensuring availability, proper tracking, and smooth operation during campaign periods.
pain: Lack of visibility into POS usage and assignment
Difficulty managing bookings from UI struggling
Manual coordination caused delays in setup for sales operations
approach: Analyzed POS booking workflow and requirments from stakeholders
Redesigned the workflow to support clear booking, assignment, and status tracking
Structured system flow to reflect real operational scenarios (multi-location, multi-event usage)
solution: Designed a booking system to manage POS allocation across events and locations
Created a clear interface for tracking POS availability and assignment status
Simplified navigation to support fast decision-making during operations
impact: Increased efficiency in preparing POS for temporary booths
Streamlined coordination between teams involved in retail operations

title: Landing Pages
description: Designed and developed multiple landing pages for marketing campaigns and product launches, focusing on improving product visibility, user engagement, and conversion.Worked closely with marketing and design teams to translate campaign concepts into clear, user-focused web experiences.
pain: Users had difficulty understanding the overall look and concept of each campaign
approach: Collaborated with marketing and design teams to understand campaign goals
solution: Developed responsive landing pages using modern frontend technologies
impact: Improved clarity of campaign messaging for online users
Supported marketing goals by improving overall campaign presentation

title: Brand website (In-house Migration)
description: Led the transition of the brand website from outsourced development to an in-house system, improving flexibility, maintainability, and speed of iteration. Collaborated with marketing and design teams to build a scalable frontend structure that supports ongoing campaign updates and evolving business needs.
pain: High cost for minor updates and changes
Limited flexibility in adjusting UI and functionality
Dependency on external vendors reduced iteration speed
approach: Collaborated with stakeholders to align on requirements for in-house control
Restructured frontend architecture to support scalability and frequent updates
Iterated on UI and layout based on marketing and design feedback
solution: Redesigned frontend architecture for better maintainability and scalability
Built reusable UI components to support faster campaign updates
Optimized performance and responsiveness across devices
impact: Reduced vendor cost and made updates faster
Increased speed and flexibility in deploying design and content updates
Enhanced overall user experience through more consistent and optimized UI
